title: Web delivery kit (WOFF2 + @font-face snippets) + accessibility usage guide
context: Shipped WOFF2 files are only as useful as the guidance for using them correctly on the web. M3 requires a web delivery kit with ready-to-use @font-face snippets and an accessibility usage guide covering size, contrast, and line-length recommendations per WCAG — framed as guidance, not a compliance certification — and repeating the non-medical framing from M1.
objective: Publish a web delivery kit with WOFF2 files and ready-to-use @font-face CSS snippets, plus an accessibility usage guide covering size, contrast, and line-length recommendations referencing WCAG as guidance (not certification), including the non-medical framing text.
acceptanceCriteria: WOFF2 files for all shipped families are included or linked in the kit.
Ready-to-use @font-face CSS snippets are published and tested against at least one browser.
Accessibility usage guide covers: minimum recommended font size, contrast ratios (referencing WCAG AA/AAA as guidance), line length, and line spacing recommendations.
Guide explicitly frames all recommendations as guidance, not WCAG compliance certification; non-medical framing text is repeated verbatim.
Guide is CC-BY-4.0 and freely embeddable by downstream Elyos projects (literacy-from-zero, decodable-readers, caption-commons, etc.).
No secrets, tokens, or API keys are included in any web kit artifact.
output: A published web delivery kit document (CC-BY-4.0) with WOFF2 + @font-face snippets and an accessibility usage guide referencing WCAG and including non-medical framing, merged into the repository.
